name: Credit for Erroneously Paid Employment Taxes

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who mistakenly paid Chapter 21 or 22 taxes for periods in which they had no legal liability.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Any tax paid under FICA or RRTA for a period where the taxpayer was not liable must be credited against other employment tax liabilities or refunded.
